===Pokémon Origins===
[[File:Lt Surge PO.png|thumb|250px|Lt. Surge in [[Pokémon Origins]]]]
Lt. Surge appeared briefly in ''[[PO02|File 2: Cubone]]''. He was shown facing {{OBP|Red|Origins}} at the Vermilion Gym during a [[Gym]] {{pkmn|battle}} and eventually getting defeated, earning Red the {{badge|Thunder}}.
